name: Lappland & Texas; The Carnavale (Arknights)
description:
"Come one, come all to the Carnavale! A festival of masks, secrecy, fireworks and magic! Just make sure to keep your head on a swivel, your life could be ended at any...moment~!"

"Lappland, stop that. You're scaring them."

"nnngh...."

(Made at the begging of a friend who is down bad for Texas and Lappland, especially for Lappland)
creator: RPKAppreciator
